case_title: SPEEDWAY COPY SYSTEMS INC VS CENTER FOR HANDICAPPED CHILDREN & TEEN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $678.20 FILED BY SPEEDWAY COPY SYSTEMS INC AS TO DEFENDANT CENTER FOR HANDICAPPED CHILDREN & TEEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
INVALID POS TO DEFT CENTER FO HANICAPPED CHILDREN AND TEEN, NO MAILING OF SUB SERVICE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-05-1996, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO JUL-09-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPEEDWAY COPY SYSTEMS INC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CENTER FOR HANDICAPPED CHILDREN & TEEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
